FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: Thursday, July 16, 2026

Advance estimates of U.S. retail and food services sales for June 2026, adjusted for seasonal variation, were $768.6 billion, up 0.2 percent from the previous month, and up 6.7 percent from June 2025. The May 2026 to June 2026 percent change was revised from up 0.9 percent to up 1.0 percent.
